seoTitle: Bondi Beach vs Bondi Junction — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bondi Beach and Bondi Junction. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bondi Beach vs Bondi Junction: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bondi Beach and Bondi Junction.
heading: Bondi Beach vs Bondi Junction — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bondi Beach, New South Wales and Bondi Junction, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bondi Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Bondi Junction (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bondi Beach or Bondi Junction safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bondi Beach has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Bondi Junction scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bondi Beach scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Bondi Junction scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bondi Beach or Bondi Junction?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bondi Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
